app.title: Bitlysis
app.tagline: Upload data, run analysis, track status — minimal UI, data first.

upload.label: Data file
upload.hint: CSV, XLSX, or XLSM — max size is set on the API.

job.needTwoColumns: At least two columns are required for the default analysis (categorical association). Add a column or call the API with a custom spec.

result.title: Structured results
result.empty: No results yet. Run analysis or wait for the job to finish.
result.chartNote: Chart payload (JSON) — for integration or export.

toast.uploadErr: Upload failed. Check format, size, and CORS/API.
toast.jobNotFound: Job not found or expired (retention). Upload again.
toast.rateLimit: Too many uploads. Wait and try again.
toast.network: Network error. Check NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL and connectivity.
toast.exportErr: Could not download ZIP. Large ZIPs may require export/start first (see API).

errors.checkApiUrl: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL to your API (e.g. staging). Restart the dev server after editing .env.local.
errors.checkCors: Ensure API_CORS_ORIGINS on the server includes your frontend origin (e.g. http://localhost:3000).
errors.checkDocs: Open /docs on the API for endpoints and error codes.
errors.openConsole: Open DevTools → Network for the full response.
